description: A truck is approaching a mileage threshold for its scheduled 'A-Service' preventive maintenance. A fleet manager must schedule the service.

nodes.task_description: Receive a system alert that a truck is due for A-Service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is notified of the upcoming maintenance requirement.

nodes.task_description: Check the truck's upcoming schedule to find a time when it will be near a maintenance facility.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that the truck will have downtime near the Atlanta terminal in 3 days.

nodes.task_description: Create a new repair order for the A-Service and schedule it with the Atlanta maintenance shop.

expected_outcome.value: A repair order is created and scheduled.
